testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp

failure.message: org.apache.hc.client5.http.HttpHostConnectException: Connect to http://kubernetes.docker.internal:9 [kubernetes.docker.internal/127.0.0.1] failed: Connection refused: no further information
